chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-1746 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on Misc.No.8661/2023. 2. For haring of main case. 15.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last fixed on 28.09.2023, which is over two years ago. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of over two years, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
